name: noa-e2e-demo
description: Instant-Tether GOLDEN DEMO (spec §2, D3) — the end-to-end integration that wires the four already-shipped slices (relay §9 + gate §8 + evidence §13 + approval-artifacts §6) and the read-only noa-mobile phone core into ONE proven flow: a fake agent proposes a risky infra action → the gate freezes it → the relay carries it → a headless phone (real pairing ceremony + device-key Decision signature) approves → the gate grants/reserves → the exact-execution wrapper runs a harmless command → an Approval Evidence Bundle verifies offline = VALID. Orchestration + drivers only — it re-implements ZERO crypto and signs NOTHING itself; every signature comes from the gate or the phone's device key.

scripts.build:deps: npm --prefix ../signer-core run build && npm --prefix ../.. run build && npm --prefix ../approval-artifacts run build && npm --prefix ../gate run build && npm --prefix ../relay run build && npm --prefix ../evidence run build
